plugins.prepareCmd: /usr/libexec/PlistBuddy -c "Set CFBundleShortVersionString ${nextRelease.version}" Exterm/App/Info.plist && make release app && ([ -n "$SIGNING_IDENTITY" ] && make sign || codesign --force --deep --sign - .build/Exterm.app) && ([ -n "$APPLE_ID" ] && make notarize || true) && make dmg
